identity.tagline: Quality assurance for the Hyo agent fleet.
identity.description: Sentinel is the QA agent for hyo.world. It continuously validates every other agent in the fleet — checking that pipelines ran, outputs match expected shape, scheduled tasks fired on time, and quality metrics stay above floor. It produces a daily QA report and files tasks into KAI_TASKS.md when it finds regressions. Runs autonomously on cron; also callable via `kai sentinel`.

checks.description: aurora's newsletter for today must exist and be > 500 bytes
hyo.world/api/health must return ok:true and founderTokenConfigured:true
checks.command: curl -sf https://www.hyo.world/api/health | python3 -c 'import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); sys.exit(0 if d.get("ok") and d.get("founderTokenConfigured") else 1)'

checks.description: every enabled scheduled task must have lastRunAt within expected window
every file in NFT/agents/ must be parseable JSON with required fields
checks.command: for f in ~/Documents/Projects/Hyo/NFT/agents/*.hyo.json; do python3 -c "import json; json.load(open('$f'))" || exit 1; done

checks.description: run the latest aurora brief through a second model and flag disagreements

pipeline.note: Runs one hour after aurora so it can validate aurora's output.

escalationRules: Same P0 check failing 2 days in a row → escalate to Hyo via desktop notification
Same P1 check failing 3 days in a row → file as P0 in KAI_TASKS
Same P2 check failing 5 days in a row → file as P1 in KAI_TASKS
No notifications at all if everything is green — silence is success

research.whyThisMatters: In 2026 agentic testing is the new competitive standard. Hybrid models — agentic for coverage/exploratory + scripted for compliance — dominate mature orgs. Sentinel implements the agentic layer; our cron-based scripted checks are the compliance layer.
